'''Rade Dromath''' was a tall [[Color/Legends|blond]], blue-[[Eye/Legends|eyed]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] native to [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]].

==Biography==
His mother was [[Dynba Tesc]] and his [[Dromath|father]] was a [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]] officer killed in the [[Thrawn campaign]]. His mother always planned for an invasion of Garqi by the [[Imperial Remnant]], and so formulated escape and resistance plans and made secret stockpiles of supplies.

Although his mother was killed when the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] first invaded Garqi, Rade escaped and used her preparations to become a leading member of the [[Resistance (Garqi)|Garqi Resistance]], later helping a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] commando unit during the [[Battle of Garqi]]. Along with the rest of the Resistance, he chose to remain behind to fight the Vong on their homeworld than to accompany the New Republic team offworld.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' {{1st}}
